descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks prepare for Atlantic Division playoff series against St. John's Maple Leafs, emphasizing defensive strategy.
descriptionLong: The Moncton Hawks face the first-place St. John's Maple Leafs in an Atlantic Division playoff semifinal beginning Wednesday night in Halifax. Hawks coach Rob Laird emphasizes team defence and the effectiveness of their checking line—Rob Murray, Russ Romaniuk, and Alan Kerr, known as "The Blanket"—while acknowledging St. John's depth and balanced scoring threats from defencemen Jeff Serowik and Ted Crowley.
